title: ESA | Home
notes: Official ESA home page; lists current graduate programs including MIM, MBA, MEMS, EMBA, EMFM, MMC, GEMBA, and DBA.

title: ESA | Overview
notes: Official degree-program overview page; states that MIM, MBA, EMBA, specialized masters, and DBA are part of ESA degree programs.

title: ESA | Aperçu
notes: French official degree-program overview page; lists all programs including MIM, MENT, MIAD, MBA, EMLux, MMC, MEMS, EMFM, EMBA, GEMBA, and DBA.

title: ESA | Master in International Management (MIM)
notes: Official MIM program page; confirms diplomas, 24-month duration, schedule, and program structure.

title: ESA | Master in Innovation and Entrepreneurship (MENT)
notes: Official MENT program page; confirms Master in Innovation and Entrepreneurship co-signed by ESA and HEC Paris, duration, target, and language.

title: ESA | Specialized Master in International Affairs and Diplomacy (MIAD)
notes: Official MIAD program page; confirms specialized master co-signed by ESA and UNITAR and 20-month structure.

title: ESA | Master in Business Administration (MBA)
notes: Official MBA page; confirms admissions criteria and AMBA/BGA accreditation context.

title: ESA | Executive Master in Luxury Transformation and Leadership (EMLux)
notes: Official EMLux page; confirms an Executive Master program, 15-month part-time format, and target audience.

title: ESA | Specialized Master in Marketing and Communication (MMC)
notes: Official MMC page; confirms two international Specialized Master diplomas from ESA and ESCP.

title: ESA | Master Exécutif en Management de la Santé (MEMS)
notes: Official MEMS page; confirms ESA Executive Master and Université Paris Cité Master 2 AMES, admissions, dates, tuition/aid summary.

title: ESA | Executive Master in Financial Management (EMFM)
notes: Official EMFM page; confirms admissions criteria, tuition-fee brochure pointer, scholarships, and financial aid summary.

title: ESA | Executive MBA (EMBA)
notes: Official EMBA page; confirms Executive MBA program and leadership/professional target.

title: ESA | Global Executive MBA (GEMBA)
notes: Official Global EMBA page; describes optional international program for ESA EMBA participants with ESCP seminars/electives/final project.

title: ESA | Doctorate in Business Administration (DBA)
notes: Official DBA page; confirms Doctorate in Business Administration objectives and doctoral-level research/professional program.

title: ESA | Admissions
notes: Official admissions/orientation page for degree programs.

title: ESA | FAQs
notes: Official FAQ page; summarizes prerequisites, duration, work-experience requirements, schedules, and language notes across programs.

title: ESA | Financial Aid
notes: Official financial aid page; describes scholarships, solidarity aid, application deadlines/requirements, and exceptions.

title: ESA Solidarity Financial Aid Application 2025-2026
notes: Official PDF with solidarity financial aid procedure and required documents for 2025-2026.
